Writing Assessment

Excel in English
Writing Skills

Our AI-powered writing assessment evaluates your coherence, grammar, vocabulary, and structure — delivering a precise CEFR-aligned score with actionable feedback to elevate your written English.

4 Skills
Evaluated
CEFR A1–C2
Level Range
Instant
AI Feedback
Comprehensive Analysis

What We Evaluate

Our AI evaluates four critical dimensions of your writing, each aligned with CEFR descriptors to provide an accurate and detailed proficiency rating.

Coherence Evaluation

AI analyzes the logical flow and connectivity of your ideas, ensuring your writing progresses naturally from introduction to conclusion.

Grammar Checking

Advanced grammar detection covers verb tenses, subject-verb agreement, article usage, punctuation, and complex sentence structures.

Vocabulary Range

Measures lexical diversity and appropriateness, from basic word choice at A1 level to sophisticated, nuanced expression at C2.

Structure Analysis

Evaluates paragraph organization, thesis development, supporting evidence, transitions, and overall composition architecture.

Simple Process

How It Works

From prompt to score in three seamless steps. Our AI handles the complex analysis so you can focus on writing your best.

01

Write Your Response

Receive a thought-provoking prompt and compose your written response. Choose from argumentative, descriptive, or analytical tasks designed for your target CEFR level.

02

AI Evaluates Writing

Our advanced AI engine analyzes your text across multiple dimensions — grammar accuracy, lexical range, coherence, cohesion, and task achievement — in real time.

03

Receive Your Score

Get a detailed CEFR-aligned score with a comprehensive breakdown, personalized feedback, and actionable improvement suggestions for each writing competency.

Writing Assessment

Ready to Test Your Writing?

Discover your CEFR writing level with our AI-powered assessment. Get detailed feedback on coherence, grammar, vocabulary, and structure — and take your written English to the next level.
